name_cn:
25C Calfskin Hip Hop Bag
Chanel hobo underarm bag hip-hop underarm bag small size
Vintage gold coin button drawstring bucket bag + quilted + vintage black gold
Classic chain design, full of sophistication! Essential for daily outings,

Size: 30*26*14.
